goal: Complete a clean-cutover full-repository refactor across Rust, Tauri, frontend, tests, scripts, workflows, packaging, documentation, and harnesses; remove obsolete structure; prove the final tree; and reach v2.9.5 source readiness while preserving immutable privacy guarantees and the Quiet Shield redesign in DESIGN.md, docs/design/README.md, and docs/design/design-spec.md.
designVerification: For redesign changes, require Computer Use or Playwright screenshot proof across touched routes, modals, toasts, settings, keyboard flow, and narrow-width states.

activeWorkstreams.nextStep: Read first for the active refactor milestone, immutable privacy guarantees, current evidence, and Rule 0 constraints.
Build the generic workspace architecture sensor, make it blocking in the focused harness and CI, then begin the storage-first cutover.
activeWorkstreams.verification: npm run harness:check; for redesign changes, add Computer Use or Playwright screenshot proof across touched routes, modals, toasts, settings, keyboard flow, and narrow-width states.

activeWorkstreams.nextStep: Keep the final ownership map and dependency rules locked; record measured changes in the active plan decision log.
activeWorkstreams.verification: npm run harness:check; npm run lint:md; npm run lint:language

deferredWorkstreams.nextStep: Re-evaluate the prior release-pipeline decisions against the final workspace during v2.9.5 readiness.
deferredWorkstreams.verification: Use the final release verification matrix after the repository refactor and cleanup are complete.

deferredWorkstreams.nextStep: Resume only after the full repository refactor, cleanup, and v2.9.5 readiness work or when the user explicitly reopens v3 feature implementation.
